# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- When adjusting Academic Info degree UI, keep Degrees in institution as a required validation rule but do not show asterisks under each degree option pill. For the academic rank UI updates, do not regenerate the section from scratch; only refactor existing markup and CSS classes for a more professional UI.
- For Basic Info Project Assessment UI, show the reason textarea only when 'No' is selected; show no extra textarea when 'Yes' is selected.
